title: vigna subterranea var. spontanea
intro: Vigna subterranea var. spontanea, also known as the spontaneous cowpea or wild cowpea, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Vigna subterranea var. spontanea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water, which can be consumed as a decoction or used topically to treat skin conditions.
